subject: ChatGPT doesn't know Test Dental LLC exists -- your AI score: 25/100
body:
Hi there,

I just ran Test Dental LLC through an AI Visibility check -- the kind of scan that shows whether your business appears when someone asks ChatGPT or Google AI "best pediatric dentist in Salt Lake City."

Your score came back 25/100.

Here is what that means: when a potential customer asks an AI assistant for a recommendation in your area, your business is not in the answer. Your competitor another pediatric dentist in Salt Lake City scored higher and is appearing in results.

I built a quick demo showing what your online presence could look like with AI optimization in place:
https://signal-works-demo-dental.vercel.app

And here is a 90-second walkthrough:
https://loom.com/share/REPLACE

The three fastest wins for you specifically:
  1. Claim your Bing Places listing -- ChatGPT uses Bing to find local businesses. Unclaimed = invisible to ChatGPT.
  2. Build topical authority content -- answer the exact questions your customers are asking AI tools about your service in your city.

I help local businesses like Test Dental LLC become the one AI recommends -- through a combination of website optimization, structured data, and monthly content updates that AI tools actually read and cite.

If this is relevant, grab 20 minutes here: https://calendly.com/boubacarbarry/signal-works-discovery-call

No pitch, no pressure. I will show you exactly what the gap is and what fixing it looks like.

Boubacar Barry
Signal Works | We make your business the one AI recommends.
